title: ADS

headings.text: USN (Update Sequence Number) Journal and ADS

overview: NTFS files can contain multiple named data attributes. The default unnamed data attribute is the visible file. Named streams use the syntax filename:streamname and are commonly called Alternate Data Streams (ADS). Named streams are not shown by regular Explorer listings.

study.overview: NTFS files can contain multiple named data attributes. The default unnamed data attribute is the visible file. Named streams use the syntax filename:streamname and are commonly called Alternate Data Streams (ADS). Named streams are not shown by regular Explorer listings.
study.whySoc: Use this note as an analyst reference: understand the concept, identify the relevant telemetry, pivot through evidence, and document the decision path clearly.
keyConcepts: USN (Update Sequence Number) Journal and ADS
workflow: Identify the user, host, process, network flow, or identity object involved.
Collect the highest-value logs first and preserve timestamps and assumptions.
Pivot through related notes, telemetry sources, and MITRE references.
Document findings, gaps, containment options, and detection improvements.
